response.justification: While Bogdan has 15+ years of professional development experience and some embedded systems background, he's fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. Most critically, the position requires native-level Japanese proficiency, which is entirely absent from his profile—he lists only English, Romanian, and basic German. Beyond this hard blocker, his expertise is primarily in web and full-stack development rather than embedded security or networking systems; there's no demonstrated experience with required security technologies (encryption, authentication systems, device attack detection) or networking protocols (Layer-2/3, switch operation, SNMP, NETCONF). His embedded systems work dates to 2014-2015 (10+ years ago), with current focus on JavaScript/AI infrastructure.
strengths: Extensive 15+ years of professional software development experience, well exceeding the 3+ year minimum requirement
Demonstrated C/C++ and systems programming knowledge from National Instruments role plus broader language versatility (DLang, Java)
Strong Linux and infrastructure background with DevOps expertise and proven ability to learn diverse technical domains
concerns: No native-level Japanese language proficiency (explicitly listed as required qualification)—only English, Romanian, and basic German
No demonstrated expertise in security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption, authentication systems, device attack detection)
Limited embedded networking experience with 10+ year gap since last embedded systems role; recent career focused on web/full-stack rather than firmware
